name: CSG SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: PART I Who We Are CSG Systems International, Inc. (the Company, CSG, or forms of the pronoun we) is a purpose-driven, SaaS platform company that enables global companies in a wide variety of industry verticals to simplify their complex customer engagement and how they monetize in the digital age.
